ALT-260320-002 Critical Financial Open

EXPENSE OVERRUN — 38% above estimate

📋 Alert Detail
🔍 Investigation
📅 Timeline
🔗 Related Alerts

Alert Description

TRP-0139 (Delhi → Jaipur) — Actual expenses ₹38,400 vs Estimated ₹27,800. Major overrun in Diesel (₹12,600 over estimate) and Misc (₹4,200 unreceipted expenses). Threshold set at 15%, actual overrun is 38%. Driver: Manoj K. Vehicle: DL01EF9012.

Alert Timeline

Alert fired
Rule "Expense overrun detection" triggered for TRP-0139. Actual ₹38,400 vs Estimated ₹27,800 (38% overrun, threshold: 15%).

In-app + Push + SMS delivered to Rahul Gupta. Email queued to Operations Head.
